sections.paragraph: m. (“mountain”), [Gebal], Psa 83:8, Gebalene, pr.n. of a mountainous region inhabited by the Edomites, extending southward from the Dead Sea to Petra, now called جبال Jebâl, Jdt_3:1 (Lat. Vers.); in the historians of the crusades, Syria Sobal; by Josephus, Eusebius, Steph. Byz., Γοβολῖτις, Γεβαληνή, Γάβαλα.
